description_long: This is a set of four rectangular benches, each with a flat seat and a simple, minimalist design. The benches are arranged in a line, each one slightly smaller than the previous, creating a tiered effect. Each bench has four straight legs, likely made of wood, and the seats appear to be made from the same material, giving a cohesive look. The benches lack armrests and have a low backrest on each, providing some support for the user. The finish is matte, with a natural wood color dominating the surfaces. This set is suitable for public spaces such as parks, plazas, or communal urban areas.
description: A set of four tiered, rectangular wooden benches with low backrests and simple, straight legs, finished in a natural wood tone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiered arrangement and the low backrests on each bench.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat seats and the four straight legs of each bench.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrests and the uniformity in design across all benches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat seats and the alignment of the legs.
